_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: We did not observe a difference in the amount of cleaved caspase-3 between Y102 treatment and vehicle control (Fig. S2B). This result suggests that Y102 does not mediate cell death through caspase-3-mediated apoptosis
details: Y102 does not mediate cell death through caspase-3-mediated apoptosis, as no difference in cleaved caspase-3 was observed between Y102 and vehicle control
